caption: A person's hand is seen resting on a table covered with a black mat, where a white banner displays the logos "ASPYS" and "SEBREAKS." In the background, stacks of boxes labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" are visible, alongside other sports card-related materials. A small inset video in the corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and glasses, speaking while sitting in a room with sports memorabilia. As the sequence progresses, the person's hand moves slightly across the "ASPYS SEBREAKS" banner. The backdrop remains static, featuring a white wall and a banner that reads "Sports Cards & Collectibles" and "HERMOSA BEACH." The inset video continues to show the man gesturing as he talks, maintaining a consistent scene of a sports card breaking environment.
